name: IRC_TN_JOB_SKILLS_VL
query: SELECT TNJOBSKILLSB.TN_JOB_SKILL_ID, TNJOBSKILLSB.TN_JOB_ID, TNJOBSKILLSB.FA_SKILL_ID, TNJOBSKILLSB.FA_SECTION_ID, TNJOBSKILLSTL.SECTION_NAME, TNJOBSKILLSTL.SKILL_NAME, TNJOBSKILLSB.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, TNJOBSKILLSB.CREATED_BY, TNJOBSKILLSB.CREATION_DATE, TNJOBSKILLSB.LAST_UPDATED_BY, TNJOBSKILLSB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, TNJOBSKILLSB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_TN_JOB_SKILLS_B TNJOBSKILLSB, IRC_TN_JOB_SKILLS_TL TNJOBSKILLSTL WHERE TNJOBSKILLSB.TN_JOB_SKILL_ID = TNJOBSKILLSTL.TN_JOB_SKILL_ID AND TNJOBSKILLSTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
